message.content:
I'll provide a comprehensive, pixel-perfect breakdown of this daily check-in popup card for you to recreate exactly:

## 1. Overall Layout and Structure
- A centered popup card with rounded corners on a dark background
- Vertical layout with multiple sections stacked from top to bottom
- Width: approximately 600px, height: approximately 800px
- Dark purple/black gradient background (#0f0a1a to #1a0d2e)
- White border with subtle glow effect

## 2. Text Content (Exact Wording)
- "DAILY CHECK-IN" (main title)
- "Check-in daily and earn ZP!" (subtitle)
- "WALLET CONNECTED" (status badge)
- "0xA4F3...9C7B" (wallet address)
- "Ethereum" (network name)
- "CHANGE WALLET" (button text)
- "CURRENT STREAK" (stat label)
- "14 Days" (stat value)
- "Keep it up!" (streak encouragement)
- "HIGHEST STREAK" (stat label)
- "14 Days" (stat value)
- "Your record" (stat description)
- "TOTAL CHECK-INS" (stat label)
- "41" (stat value)
- "All time" (stat description)
- "TOTAL ZP EARNED" (stat label)
- "2,850" (stat value)
- "All time" (stat description)
- "TODAY'S REWARD" (section header)
- "8 ZP" (reward amount)
- "Day 14 of your streak" (reward description)
- "NEXT REWARD" (section header)
- "9 ZP" (reward amount)
- "Tomorrow (Day 15)" (reward description)
- "NEXT BONUS" (section header)
- "Day 14 Bonus" (bonus title)
- "30 ZP" (bonus amount)
- "Keep going!" (bonus encouragement)
- "CLAIM TODAY'S REWARD" (button text)
- "Next check-in in:" (timer label)
- "23" (hours)
- "59" (minutes)
- "12" (seconds)
- "HRS" (hours label)
- "MIN" (minutes label)
- "SEC" (seconds label)
- "YOUR CHECK-IN JOURNEY" (section header)
- "Day 10" (journey day)
- "10 ZP" (journey reward)
- "Day 11" (journey day)
- "11 ZP" (journey reward)
- "Day 12" (journey day)
- "12 ZP" (journey reward)
- "Day 13" (journey day)
- "13 ZP" (journey reward)
- "Day 14" (journey day)
- "TODAY" (journey status)
- "23" (journey day number)
- "8 ZP" (journey reward)
- "Day 15" (journey day)
- "9 ZP" (journey reward)
- "Day 16" (journey day)
- "16 ZP" (journey reward)
- "Day 17" (journey day)
- "17 ZP" (journey reward)
- "Day 21" (journey day)
- "BONUS" (journey status)
- "60 ZP" (journey reward)
- "Miss a day and your streak will restart from Day 1." (journey warning)
- "RECENT CLAIM HISTORY" (section header)
- "VIEW ALL" (history button)
- "May 18, 2025" (history date)
- "9:41 AM" (history time)
- "Day 13" (history day)
- "+13 ZP" (history reward)
- "May 17, 2025" (history date)
- "9:32 AM" (history time)
- "Day 12" (history day)
- "+12 ZP" (history reward)
- "May 16, 2025" (history date)
- "9:28 AM" (history time)
- "Day 11" (history day)
- "+11 ZP" (history reward)
- "All times are based on server time (UTC)" (history note)
- "ACHIEVEMENT BADGES" (section header)
- "VIEW ALL" (badges button)
- "7 Day Survivor" (badge name)
- "14 Day Dedicated" (badge name)
- "30 Day Loyal" (badge name)
- "60 Day Warrior" (badge name)
- "100 Day Legend" (badge name)
- "365 Day OG" (badge name)
- "One claim per day. Rewards reset if you miss a day. All rewards are in ZP (Zyron Points)." (footer text)

## 3. Colors Used
- Background: Dark purple/black gradient (#0f0a1a to #1a0d2e)
- Text: White (#ffffff) for primary text, Light purple (#b8a2ff) for secondary text
- Accent: Bright purple (#8a2be2) for buttons and highlights
- Status: Green (#4ade80) for connected status
- ZP coins: Gold (#ffd700) and purple (#8a2be2)
- Badges: Bronze (#cd7f32), Silver (#c0c0c0), Gold (#ffd700)
- Timer: White text on dark background
- Warning text: Light purple (#b8a2ff)

## 4. Image/Photo Content
- Calendar icon with checkmark (purple)
- Wallet icon (white)
- Fire icon (orange/red)
- Trophy icon (gold)
- Calendar icon (blue)
- ZP coin icon (purple)
- ZP coin stack (gold)
- Gift box icon (purple with gold ribbon)
- Checkmark icons (green circles)
- Various achievement badge icons (bronze, silver, gold shields)
- Small star/sparkle decorations throughout

## 5. Buttons and Their Styling
- "CHANGE WALLET" button:
  - Purple background (#8a2be2)
  - White text
  - Rounded corners (8px)
  - Border: 1px solid #a876ff
  - Padding: 8px 16px
  - Font weight: 500
  - Hover effect: Slightly lighter purple background

- "CLAIM TODAY'S REWARD" button:
  - Bright purple background (#8a2be2)
  - White text
  - Larger rounded corners (12px)
  - Border: 2px solid #a876ff
  - Padding: 12px 24px
  - Font weight: 600
  - Shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(138, 43, 226, 0.3)
  - Icon: Calendar with checkmark (white)

- "VIEW ALL" buttons:
  - Purple background (#8a2be2)
  - White text
  - Rounded corners (6px)
  - Padding: 6px 12px
  - Font weight: 500
  - Smaller size than main button

## 6. Position and Size of Each Element
- Close button (X): Top right corner, 16px from edges, 24px square
- Title: Centered at top, below calendar icon
- Wallet section: Below title, full width
- Stats row: Below wallet section, 4 equal columns
- Rewards section: Below stats, 3 equal columns
- Claim button: Full width below rewards
- Timer: Below claim button, centered
- Journey section: Below timer, full width
- History section: Below journey, 2 columns
- Badges section: Right column of history section
- Footer: Bottom of card, full width

## 7. Icons, Badges, and Special Elements
- Calendar icon with checkmark (top center)
- Wallet icon (left of address)
- User avatar (circular, right of address)
- Fire icon (left of current streak)
- Trophy icon (left of highest streak)
- Calendar icon (left of total check-ins)
- ZP coin icon (left of total ZP earned)
- ZP coin icons (below today's reward)
- ZP coin stack (below next reward)
- Gift box icon (below next bonus)
- Checkmark icons (in journey section)
- Achievement badges (in badges section)
- Information icon (next to journey warning)
- Information icon (next to footer text)

## 8. Border Radius, Shadows, and Spacing
- Card border radius: 16px
- Section border radius: 12px
- Button border radius: 8-12px
- Shadow on card: 0 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)
- Shadow on claim button: 0 4px 12px rgba(138, 43, 226, 0.3)
- Spacing between sections: 16px
- Padding inside card: 24px
- Padding inside sections: 16px
- Gap between journey days: 8px

## 9. Typography
- Main title: "DAILY CHECK-IN" - Bold (700), 32px, white, centered
- Subtitle: "Check-in daily and earn ZP!" - Regular (400), 16px, light purple, centered
- Section headers: Bold (600), 18px, white
- Stat labels: Regular (400), 14px, light purple
- Stat values: Bold (600), 24px, white
- Reward amounts: Bold (700), 36px, white/purple
- Journey day numbers: Bold (600), 18px, white
- History text: Regular (400), 14px, white/light purple
- Footer text: Regular (400), 12px, light purple

## 10. Gradient and Special Effects
- Background gradient: Dark purple to black
- Button gradient: Purple to slightly lighter purple
- ZP coin gradient: Gold to yellow
- Subtle glow effect on card edges
- Sparkle animations on calendar icon and gift box
- Hover effects on interactive elements
- Pulse animation on today's journey day
- Countdown timer with smooth transitions

This detailed breakdown should allow you to recreate the popup card with pixel-perfect accuracy. Pay special attention to the color values, spacing, and icon placements to match the original design exactly.
